title: Bat Removal & Exclusion Services in Long Beach, NY
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Long Beach, Long Island. Safe, humane bat extraction from homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Long Beach residents facing bat infestations need immediate, professional assistance to safely remove these protected animals from their homes. Our certified bat removal specialists provide comprehensive exclusion services throughout Long Beach, from beachfront properties to the historic West End neighborhoods. We ensure humane removal while protecting your family and property from health hazards associated with bat guano and droppings.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Long Beach homeowners for years with specialized bat removal expertise tailored to coastal Long Island properties. Our team understands the unique challenges of bat intrusions in Long Beach's mix of classic bungalows, modern beach houses, and multi-family residences, providing guaranteed exclusion work that stands up to oceanside conditions.
localContext: Long Beach's proximity to the Atlantic Ocean and its older housing stock, particularly in areas near the boardwalk and National Boulevard, create ideal roosting conditions for bats seeking shelter. The city's historic homes and seasonal beach cottages often have aging soffits, vents, and roof lines where bats commonly enter, making professional exclusion services essential for year-round residents and summer homeowners alike.

faqs.question: What does the $900-$2,500 price range include for bat removal in Long Beach?
faqs.answer: Our bat removal pricing covers a complete inspection of your Long Beach property, humane bat exclusion using one-way devices, sealing all entry points, attic cleanup and sanitization, and a warranty on our exclusion work. The final cost depends on colony size, number of entry points, and extent of guano cleanup required. Most Long Beach homes fall in the $1,200-$1,800 range.

faqs.question: When is bat season in Long Beach, and when should exclusion be done?
faqs.answer: Bats are most active in Long Beach from April through October. However, exclusion work cannot be performed during maternity season (June-July) when flightless pups are present. The best times for bat removal in Long Beach are spring (April-May) and late summer through fall (August-October) to ensure all bats can safely exit.

faqs.question: Are bats common in Long Beach homes near the ocean?
faqs.answer: Yes, bats are surprisingly common in Long Beach despite the oceanfront location. Little brown bats and big brown bats frequently roost in attics, soffits, and wall voids of Long Beach homes. The insect population near the water provides abundant food, while older beach cottages and year-round residences offer ideal roosting spots with easy access points.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Long Beach regulated, and do I need permits?
faqs.answer: Bats are protected under New York State law, making it illegal to harm them. Professional bat removal companies handle all necessary compliance with state and local Long Beach regulations. No homeowner permits are typically required, but all exclusion work must be done humanely using approved methods. Our licensed technicians ensure full legal compliance throughout the removal process.
